task_completion.description: Verify the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset is loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data Panel on the left side of the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface shows 'Sample Order Lines' as the active dataset.

task_completion.description: Verify a table visualization is created with 'Product Name' and 'Sales'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table visualization is visible on the main canvas containing columns explicitly labeled 'Product Name' and 'Sales'.

task_completion.description: Verify a Data Action is created with the correct name and type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data Actions dialog is open, showing a new action named 'Search Product' with its Type set to 'URL Navigation'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Data Action is anchored to the 'Product Name' column.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Data Actions dialog, the 'Anchor To' field is populated with 'Product Name'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Data Action URL is set to search Google with the product name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Data Actions dialog, the URL field contains 'https://www.google.com/search?q={Product Name}'.

task_completion.description: Verify the workbook is saved as 'Product_Search_Tool' in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog shows the file being saved as 'Product_Search_Tool' in the Documents folder, or the application title bar displays 'Product_Search_Tool'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Oracle Analytics Desktop application interface being used, not a terminal or text editor modifying a .dva file.

integrity.description: Verify the data action was configured using the application's built-in dialog.
integrity.visual_evidence: The official Data Actions configuration dialog box is visible in the screenshots, showing the actual input fields.

integrity.description: Verify the file was saved using the GUI save dialog.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard save dialog is used to navigate to the Documents folder, rather than terminal commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected filename is 'Product_Search_Tool.dva'. The data action must be named 'Search Product'. The URL pattern must include 'google.com/search'. The action must be anchored to and pass the parameter 'Product Name'.
